summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OLL skill-education platform. All major features tested successfully including landing page, student/educator/school funnels, FAQ page, admin panel with JWT auth, and CRM functionality.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with 3 clickable user type cards
Student multi-step funnel works completely (8 steps including demo booking)
Student inquiry submission creates record via POST /api/students/inquiry
Educator funnel application form submission works
Educator requirements page loads (GET /api/requirements)
School funnel inquiry submission works
FAQ page loads with searchable questions and category filters
Support ticket submission works (POST /api/support/ticket)
About page loads
Blog pages load
Admin login/register works with JWT authentication
Admin dashboard shows stats with 8 stat cards
Admin can view student inquiries in CRM
Admin can view school inquiries in CRM
Admin can view educator applications in CRM
All backend API endpoints working (16/16 tests passed)
Mobile responsive design works
Navigation between pages works
Form validations work properly
Calendar component works for demo booking
Multi-step form progression works
Admin panel navigation works
